race.comment: HEART 'N' POWER (2) ran a better race last start when second-up from a spell, leading for home only to be swamped late over 1200m at this track. Less pressure today over this trip and she should be tough to catch. TURBO TORQUE (7) made it eight minor placings from 15 starts when he closed well but found a couple better over this distance at the Sunshine Coast poly last time out. Races well here and makes plenty of appeal with a big drop in the weights. NEXT LEGACY (3) has improved at each appearance this prep. Lengthened nicely to be beaten just half a length over 1200m here recently. Very fit and looks ready for a first crack at 1400m. LEICA FLAMINGO (6) was six weeks between runs when a close fourth over 1200m at this circuit last start. Has a good record here at the trip so she can progress from that last outing. FUNDORA (4) broke his maiden in impressive fashion at Warwick last Sunday. Can go on with it now.
